name: agenttool-collab
description: Local agent tasks and cross-device release coordination

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local tasks and cross-device releases.
interface.longDescription: Combines a local plaintext SQLite task journal with signed cross-device facts and an optional repository-scoped release room for cooperative external-operation leases and bounded provider observations. Git still carries bytes; the relay is server-readable; and no task, claim, check, receipt, or observation grants external authority. The host retains agent lifecycle, polling, credentials, and provider authorization.
defaultPrompt: Coordinate local edit tasks without overlapping path scopes.
Reconcile signed facts and Git-addressed work across devices.
Serialize this authorised release and verify its provider evidence.
